hero.heading: Turn Your Data into a Business Expert
hero.subtitle: Most AI analytics tools connect to your data and stop there. xFalcon adds domain expertise, institutional memory, and guardrails that prevent the analytical mistakes that cost real money.

whatIs.text: xFalcon is an AI analytics workspace that comes pre-trained on your industry — ready to surface decisions, not just charts.

points.title: Domain Expertise
points.description: Pre-built industry knowledge specific to retail, healthcare, finance, manufacturing, and more.

points.title: Built-In Business Logic
points.description: Encodes guardrails and proven analysis patterns so teams avoid analytical mistakes.

points.title: Industry Intelligence
points.description: Institutional knowledge embedded into every analysis — so users get context, not just numbers.

points.title: Analytics Guardrails
points.description: Automated checks that prevent misleading visualizations and flawed comparisons before they happen.

points.title: Faster Time-to-Value
points.description: Industry-ready analytics experiences that reduce setup time and accelerate insights.

socialProof.text: Built as a browser-native replacement for desktop-style agent workflows with first-class MCP integration.

overview.heading: Chat Is the Primary Surface, MCP Is First-Class
overview.content:
The MVP is intentionally scoped as a browser-native chat workspace rather than a visual workflow builder. The core architecture prioritizes run traceability, provider flexibility, tool transparency, and reusable skills.

Fixed decisions in the docs define MCP as non-negotiable across UI, runtime, storage, and permissions, with a deep integration path for the existing data-analyst backend.

features.heading: MVP Capabilities Aligned to the Product Spec
features.description: Chat-first operations with deep MCP visibility, provider flexibility, and skill-aware executions

items.title: Persistent Chat + Streaming
items.description: Run SSE-based chat with persistent threads, reopen past conversations, and continue from saved context.

items.title: Multi-Provider Model Layer
items.description: Use OpenRouter, Anthropic Direct, and OpenAI Direct through a provider-scoped model selection flow.

items.title: MCP Server Registry
items.description: Register MCP servers, run health checks, discover tools automatically, and attach servers per chat.

items.title: Tool Execution Timeline
items.description: Inspect tool input, output, status, and raw request/response data directly in the chat timeline.

items.title: Approval + Permission Controls
items.description: Use allow/ask/deny policies and pause execution for explicit user approval on privileged actions.

items.title: Skill-Aware Runtime Path
items.description: Import and enable markdown skills per chat, with compatibility targets for data-analyst, OpenCode, and Claude formats.

benefits.heading: Why Teams Choose xFalcon
benefits.subheading: Built for clarity, control, and reliable delivery in every run.

items.title: Clear Run Visibility
items.description: Track decisions, tool calls, and outputs in one readable timeline.

items.title: Provider Flexibility
items.description: Switch providers and models per use case without changing your workflow.

items.title: Safe Execution Controls
items.description: Use approvals and permission policies before sensitive actions execute.

items.title: Create a new chat and select a models
items.description: Begin in the chat-first UI and choose the provider/model combination for the current thread.

items.title: Attach MCP servers for the session
items.description: Enable one or more MCP servers and verify tool discovery before execution.

items.title: Enable required skills
items.description: Turn on relevant skills for the chat so the runtime can load them on demand.

items.title: Run tasks with tool and approval visibility
items.description: Watch streaming output, inspect tool cards, and approve or deny sensitive actions when prompted.

pricing.heading: Choose the Right Plan for Your Agent Workspace

items.name: Starter
items.description: For solo builders getting started with chat-based agent workflows.

items.name: Growth
items.description: For growing teams running production workflows with MCP tools.

items.name: Enterprise
items.description: For organizations needing advanced security, compliance, and scale.

demosSection.heading: Industry-Ready Analytics Solutions
demosSection.subheading: Not templates—pre-built intelligence designed to solve real business problems across multiple industries.

items.question: What is xFalcon-web in this MVP?
items.answer: It is a chat-based web application for interacting with your own agent runtime, model providers, MCP servers, and skills in one browser workspace.

items.question: Is MCP optional in this product?
items.answer: No. The docs define MCP as a first-class, non-negotiable capability across the UI, runtime, storage, and permission model.

items.question: Which model providers are currently supported?
items.answer: Current implementation supports OpenRouter, Anthropic Direct, and OpenAI Direct through a provider abstraction layer.

items.question: Can I inspect tool execution details during a run?
items.answer: Yes. The UI includes tool timeline cards, input/output and status visibility, and an expandable raw request/response inspector.

items.question: Are skills supported in the MVP?
items.answer: Yes. Skills are first-class and currently in progress for registry/import/enablement, with compatibility targets for data-analyst, OpenCode, and Claude skill formats.

items.question: What is out of scope for this MVP?
items.answer: Out-of-scope items include a drag-and-drop workflow builder, marketplace/public skill exchange, large-scale org admin, and billing/usage charging UI.
